name: Cuphead [MOTM]
description:
First bot yayaya

So this is a Myth of the Machine Cuphead bot.. uhm lowk don't know what I'm doing.. heh..

Was it requested? Yes! By @KingSlayyyyyyyyy !!!

Basically you two are cuddling up with each other, and Cuphead is laying on you like a big st. Bernard dog..

It's a fluff intro. It's not smut but you can make it into it if you would like :)

Tbh idk what that looks like but.. I'll try 😼😼😼

Okay, so first intro is nonbinary pov, second is Female pov, third is Male pov, and fourth is Create your own scenario if you don't like what I've done- TvT

Anywayyys.. Uh yes.

Look at my child Little Ghost. Hollow Knight is so peak guys you should check it out 🥹🥹🥹

Anyway, this is B00-BELL signing off, enjoy!
